name: Finska Pinnar (Finnish Fingers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter until creamy.
2. Add the sugar and beat again.
3. Incorporate the egg yolk.
4. Stir in the vanilla.
5. Gradually mix in the flour to form dough. Chill the mixture.
6. Roll the dough into long ropes, each about 1/2 inch in diameter.
7. Brush the ropes with lightly beaten egg white.
8. Cut the ropes into 2 1/2-inch lengths.
9. Dip each length into pearl sugar to coat.
10. Place the coated pieces on greased baking sheets.
11. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
